title: callista calophylla
intro: Callista calophylla, also known as the golden moon orchid, is a species of orchid that is native to Australia. This plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be beneficial in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Callista calophylla include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and improve immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of dried flowers, extracts, and tinctures, which can be used to create topical creams, ointments, and other medicinal products.
